hooks.command: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && xcodebuild build -scheme Pastura -project Pastura/Pastura.xcodeproj -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -quiet 2>&1 || (echo 'Build failed. Fix compile errors before committing.' >&2 && exit 2)

cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && git diff main...HEAD --name-only | grep -q CLAUDE.md || echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"warning":"CLAUDE.md not modified in this branch. Check if implementation progress needs updating."}}'
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"additionalContext":"Reminder: This is Pastura (Swift/iOS). Follow CLAUDE.md hard rules. No force unwrap (!), no Engine→Data imports, TDD mandatory."}}'
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"warning":"Check if any memory files need to be created or updated based on this session."}}'
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path | select(endswith(".swift"))' | xargs -I {} sh -c 'swift-format format --in-place "$1" && swiftlint lint --fix --quiet "$1"' _ {}
